chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْإِسْلَامَ يُحْقَنُ بِهِ الدَّمُ وَ تُؤَدَّى بِهِ الْأَمَانَةُ وَ أَنَّ الثَّوَابَ عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – Al-Islām, the blood is saved by it, and the entrustments are paid by it, and that the Rewards are based upon the faith

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/126)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/126)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ قالَتِ الْأَعْرابُ آمَنَّا قُلْ لَمْ تُؤْمِنُوا وَ لكِنْ قُولُوا أَسْلَمْنا فَمَنْ زَعَمَ أَنَّهُمْ آمَنُوا فَقَدْ كَذَبَ وَ مَنْ زَعَمَ أَنَّهُمْ لَمْ يُسْلِمُوا فَقَدْ كَذَبَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, and a number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, altogether from Al Washa, from Aban, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘[49:14] The Bedouins say: We believe. Say: You do not believe but say, We are Muslims. So the ones who claim that they have believed, so they have lied, and the ones who claim that they have not become Muslims, so they have lied’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu’alla ibn Muhammad and a number of our people from Ahmad ibn Muhammad all of them from al- Washsha’ from Aban from abu Basir who has said the following: “I heard Abu Ja’far (a.s.) saying, ‘The Arabs have said, “We have established belief.” Say, “You have not established belief but say, ‘We have accepted Islam.’ Belief has not yet entered your hearts.” [49:14] Whoever thinks that they (Arabs) had belief, his thoughts are false and whoever thinks that they had not accepted Islam he has lied.’”
